name: Regenesis Commands
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>再世十戒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>リジェネシス・コマンドメンツ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
Apply these effects to all cards your opponent controls in the same column as your "Regenesis" monsters.
● Face-up cards: Negate their effects.
● Face-down monsters: Cannot change their battle positions.
● Face-down Spells/Traps: Cannot be activated until the end of the next turn.
You can only activate 1 "Regenesis Commands" per turn.
eff:
Apply these effects to all cards your opponent controls in the same column as your "Regenesis" monsters.
● Face-up cards: Negate their effects.

● Face-down Spells/Traps: Cannot be activated until the end of the next turn.
You can only activate 1 "Regenesis Commands" per turn.

mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the effects of your opponent's Trap Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
